groupings.title: Quick start
groupings.description: Start here. The umbrella skill auto-routes user questions to the right specialized skill below.

groupings.title: Tokens
groupings.description: Resolve, screen, and research tokens across 11 chains. Smart-money inflow, holders, recent transfers, OHLCV.

groupings.title: Wallets
groupings.description: Per-wallet profile, PnL, counterparty graphs, ENS, batch labelling, fund affiliation, DeFi positions.

groupings.title: CEX perps
groupings.description: Funding-rate arb + cross-venue mark-price spreads across Binance, Bybit, OKX, Aster, Hyperliquid.

groupings.title: Hyperliquid perps
groupings.description: Deep on-chain HL coverage: top traders, full trader profiles, and share-card reverse-lookup.

groupings.title: Options
groupings.description: Deribit BTC/ETH options flow + put-call ratios.

groupings.title: Polymarket
groupings.description: Prediction-market discovery, single-market deep-dives, trader profiles, and smart-money leaderboards.

groupings.title: Alerts
groupings.description: Create, list, edit, delete price + flow alerts; register HTTPS webhooks with HMAC delivery.

groupings.title: Web research
groupings.description: Off-chain context: general web search and AI-summarized URL fetch for news, docs, and social.
